---
title: "Results and Analysis"
author: "[Marie Langeland](https://www.linkedin.com/in/marie-langeland)"
format: html
---

(IKKE FERDIG)


(legg til predictions summary graf (average marginal effect) også)

```{R}
#| include: false 
# Pakker
library(tidyverse)
library(readxl)
library(bst290)
library(texreg)
library(margins)
library(prediction)
# fikse æøå
Sys.setlocale("LC_ALL", "nb_NO.UTF-8")
############## data cleaning ##############
# laste inn
ap <- labelled::unlabelled(read_excel("ap.xlsx"))
frp <- labelled::unlabelled(read_excel("frp.xlsx"))
# endre variabel navn
ap <- ap %>%
  rename(tax = ap_tax)
frp <- frp %>%
  rename(tax = frp_tax)
# legge til identifiserings variabel 
ap$treatment <- "Ap"
frp$treatment  <- "Frp"
# filtrere og sånt
ap <- ap %>%
  select(gender, age, domicil, socmed, polint, tax, party, test, treatment)
frp <- frp %>%
  select(gender, age, domicil, socmed, polint, tax, party, test, treatment)
# fikse test på begge til rett og feil
ap <- ap %>%
  mutate(test_ = recode(test,
                        "Ap" = "Rett",
                        "Frp" = "Feil",
                        "vet_ikke" = "Vet ikke"))
frp <- frp %>%
  mutate(test_ = recode(test,
                        "Frp" = "Rett",
                        "Ap" = "Feil",
                        "vet_ikke" = "Vet ikke"))
# merge
survey <- bind_rows(ap, frp)
# gender = 1: Kvinne, 2: Mann
survey <- survey %>%
  mutate(gender = na_if(gender, "0")) 
survey <- survey %>%
  mutate(gender = recode(gender, 
                         "1" = "kvinne", 
                         "2" = "mann"))
# age (fjerne alle over 25)
survey$age <- as.numeric(survey$age)
survey <- survey %>%
  mutate(ung = ifelse(age <= 25, age, NA))
# domicil 
survey$domicil_num <- as.numeric(survey$domicil)
# socmed 
survey$socmed <- as.numeric(survey$socmed) 
# polint
survey$polint <- as.numeric(survey$polint)
# tax 
survey$tax <- as.numeric(survey$tax)
# party (hvilket parti nærmest)
survey <- survey %>%
  mutate(party = replace(party, party %in% c("annet", "nekt", "vet_ikke"), NA))
mod8 <- lm(tax ~ treatment*party, data = survey)
surveyy <- survey %>%
  filter(test_ == "Rett")
model8 <- lm(tax ~ treatment*party, data = surveyy)
model7 <- lm(tax ~ gender + age + domicil_num + polint + party + treatment, data = survey)
model7_ <- lm(tax ~ gender + age + domicil_num + polint + party + treatment, data = surveyy)
```



```{R}
#| echo: false
#| message: false

marginaleffects::predictions(model = mod8,
                             by = c("treatment","party")) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = treatment, y = estimate, ymin = conf.low,
             ymax = conf.high, fill = treatment)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Ap" = "#CF111D", "Frp" = "#09367F")) +
  facet_wrap(~ party) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity") +
  geom_linerange() +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(1, 5)) + 
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(1, 5, 1)) +
  labs(x = "", y = "", fill = "Survey 
version",
       title = "Support for Inheritance Tax by Party Affiliation and Survey Version")+
  theme_bw() +
  theme(text = element_text(family = "serif", size = 12),
        strip.background = element_rect(fill = "#4B2C3E", color = "#4B2C3E"), 
        strip.text = element_text(color = "white", face = "bold"))

```



```{R}
#| echo: false
#| message: false

margins_summary(model = model7) %>% 
  ggplot(aes(y = factor, x = AME, xmin = lower, xmax = upper)) +
  geom_point(shape = 1, size = 2.5) + 
  geom_linerange(linewidth = 0.5) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray") +
  scale_x_continuous(labels = scales::percent, breaks = seq(-2, 2, 0.5)) + 
  scale_y_discrete(labels = c("treatmentFrp" = "Frp Treatment",
                              "polint" = "Political Interest",
                              "gendermann" = "Male",
                              "partyV" = "V",
                              "partySV" = "SV",
                              "partySp" = "Sp",
                              "partyR" = "R",
                              "partyMDG" = "MDG",
                              "partyKrf" = "Krf",
                              "partyH" = "H",
                              "partyFrp" = "Frp",
                              "domicil_num" = "Domicile",
                              "age" = "Age")) +
  labs(x = "",
       y = "", 
       caption = "95% Confidence Intervals.",
       title = "Predicted Level of Attitudes Toward Inheritance Tax",
       subtitle = "Effect of variables (Reference: Ap)") +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(text = element_text(family = "serif", size = 13))

```


## Robustness Check

```{R}
#| echo: false
#| message: false 

marginaleffects::predictions(model = model8,
                             by = c("treatment","party")) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = treatment, y = estimate, ymin = conf.low,
             ymax = conf.high, fill = treatment)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Ap" = "#CF111D", "Frp" = "#09367F")) +
  facet_wrap(~ party) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity") +
  geom_linerange() +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(1, 5)) + 
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(1, 5, 1)) +
  labs(x = "", y = "", fill = "Survey 
version",
       title = "Support for Inheritance Tax by Party Affiliation and Survey Version")+
  theme_bw() +
  theme(text = element_text(family = "serif", size = 12),
        strip.background = element_rect(fill = "#4B2C3E", color = "#4B2C3E"), 
        strip.text = element_text(color = "white", face = "bold"))

```


```{R}
#| echo: false
#| message: false

margins_summary(model = model7_) %>% 
  ggplot(aes(y = factor, x = AME, xmin = lower, xmax = upper)) +
  geom_point(shape = 1, size = 2.5) + 
  geom_linerange(linewidth = 0.5) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray") +
  scale_x_continuous(labels = scales::percent, breaks = seq(-2, 2, 0.5)) + 
  scale_y_discrete(labels = c("treatmentFrp" = "Frp Treatment",
                              "polint" = "Political Interest",
                              "gendermann" = "Male",
                              "partyV" = "V",
                              "partySV" = "SV",
                              "partySp" = "Sp",
                              "partyR" = "R",
                              "partyMDG" = "MDG",
                              "partyKrf" = "Krf",
                              "partyH" = "H",
                              "partyFrp" = "Frp",
                              "domicil_num" = "Domicile",
                              "age" = "Age")) +
  labs(x = "",
       y = "", 
       caption = "95% Confidence Intervals.",
       title = "Predicted Level of Attitudes Toward Inheritance Tax",
       subtitle = "Effect of variables (Reference: Ap)") +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(text = element_text(family = "serif", size = 13))

```
